title: astragalus creticus
intro: Astragalus creticus, also known as the Cretan milk-vetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus creticus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies and modern supplements.
